reviews.review_description: I have tried contacting the dev forever, just to be ignored. If you're not going to add content, then you should just remove your game. It's empty, boring, and literally only surviving because you have decent web swinging. This game has been out for many years, and we are still fighting the same generic enemies in 3 small sections of the map. The cops are barely even a faction, with the majority at the bank, and when you kill civilians, only 2 cops come after you. There needs to be other enemy types, random encounters across the entire map. Maybe even some more missions that pre-populate areas with said enemies. Multiplayer was never enough. I don't even understand how players have fun with their friends in an empty world.

This could make the game an over the top game

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, just one thing missing
reviews.review_description: The game is amazing, ive almost 100% completed it because its very addicting, but there should be more web shooting mechanics besides just a rope. Like a web-net sort of thing that can tie up enemies and stick guns and items to surfaces. I think this would be such a fun mechanic in the game, and will open opportunity for more diverse forms of combat than what is available. Dont get me wrong the combat is fun, but its not at its full potential yet, but with more additions to the web shooters it will be great. Please take my idea into consideration, thank you.

This game is insanely good. It captures the feeling of being Spider-Man spot on. I love fighting in regular speed, because it feels like a treat when you get a slow motion attack after zipping an enemy toward you. I love all the melee options, my favorite the knife, maybe even more than the guns. But, I wished there was a story mode. This game has soooooooooo much potential, and if it adds a story mode, like the tutorial, it would be the best Spider-Man game by far. Also add multiplayer. I think you should have a story mode so that there’s a single player mode when you’re friends can’t 
play, and then there’s multiplayer when they can. if you do add multiplayer, add private lobbies. But most of all, make a story mode.
This game is super fun

Battle Glide – Review (4/5 ⭐)

Battle Glide is honestly a super fun and exciting VR game. The movement feels amazing, especially the swinging and gliding mechanics, which make you feel fast, free, and powerful. It’s one of those games where you can just jump in and immediately have a great time. The overall gameplay loop is enjoyable, and the concept is really well done.

However, I can’t give it 5 stars because of some major issues I experienced.

At one point, my entire game suddenly reset, and I lost everything I had unlocked and worked for. That was really frustrating and took away a lot of motivation to keep progressing.

On top of that, there are problems with mission rewards. When I complete missions, my scores don’t save properly. Because of this, I can’t unlock certain weapons. Even worse, the missions that are supposed to unlock weapons don’t seem to work at all, which means I’m basically stuck and unable to progress.

So overall:

- The gameplay and mechanics are fantastic
- But the progression system is currently broken (at least for me)

If these issues get fixed, this could easily be a 5-star game. For now, I’d rate it 4 out of 5 stars because the core experience is great, but the bugs are holding it back.

This was such a great game and this would be a five star review if he actually added multiplayer instead of saying “multiplayer is coming soon” and then disappearing for another three months. I get wanted to focus on the update but you should at least make a couple of videos to give us updates instead of completely abandoning us for months on end without any updates. I was supporting the people who were patient and giving him space but the fact that it looked done around this time last year just makes me mad because if you can get another person to help test and fully developed player models and gun skins you can probably just release the update at that point. Don get me wrong it’s a well made game but it could be so much better. And if you’re struggling with development then just hire more devs. I don’t get why you have to be a solo developer.

And there’s STEALTH MISSIONS super fun and I find my self coming back to the game

1. more Areas to fight like at the bridge

2. I want some secrets like a nail gun that you can find  at a mini construction site that spawns at a random one you can’t keep it forever 
 
3.i want more Items you can grab ( For example the pc/mouse/keyboard in the tutorial)

6. more gun stuff like modding your gun with Extended mags and you have the option to put it on So that way you can decide what guns should have a silencer or extended mag.￼

7. I would want a Sewer that and  you have to lift a manhole open to and go into 

8. Some different enemy types.

9. NPCS right now they kind of just go for a gun and if they don’t have one then they just run them being able to punch and kick would be really cool.￼￼￼

Battle Glide is an amazing VR Game that makes you fell like Spider-Man.
It has the combat of games like Bonelab while having parkour like Dying Light 2.
So should you download it?
Yes.
It’s a fun vr game and there’s a sale AND a new update soon that adds Multiplayer.
It’s worth more that it costs and deserves to be king.
Get Battle Glide now for a fun break from the crappy vr games that cost the same.

The game is incredible and I think that the collectibles is a really good idea but there are a few things that I think should be different. 
1. There should be multiplayer, every other Spider-Man vr game has multiplayer and even though this is the best one its missing multiplayer
2. More maps, the map gets boring after a while and we need something new
3. Different powers like maybe flight or super speed to add some variety
4. More enemy types because right now there is only "small criminals with guns". I was thinking they could add more tanky enemies or flying enemies
5. An inventory system, the menu and backpacks are fine but its a bit tedious to have to go into the menu to grab a weapon. Why cant we just put items in our inventory on maybe a belt and grab items when we need them
Besides all this the game is really fun and the swinging feels really fluid and the combat and stealth is fun. HIGHLY RECCOMEND

The game itself isn’t bad like it’s polished which is good because most vr games aren’t. But it’s only fun for like 30 minutes because the dev is so focused on adding multiplayer. Multiplayer will not revive your game nor does it automatically fix everything. The game is boring because there’s 3 random encounters and 1 enemy type and no melee combat. The faction warfare is a good idea, the bland enemy type is not. I think multiplayer should be the last thing you add to a game and it doesn’t at all fit this one in my opinion. But in general the game is repetitive and not in a fun way because there’s nothing to do after a half hour. But add multiplayer, right?
